name: Growthpoint Properties Australia
analysis: GOZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.2850. Trade idea: entry A$2.3300, stop A$2.0790, target A$3.0830 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
